name: Jahen Household Products Co., Ltd.
summary: Jahen Household Products Co., Ltd. engages in the design, development, and manufacture of plastic packaging containers; and research, development, and manufacture of cosmetics, and personal care and household chemical products in China and internationally. The company offers plastic packaging materials, such as injection and extrusion molding products, and extrusion tubes for use in cosmetics, lubricants, and the FMCG industry. It also provides cream, lotion, cleanser, mask, skin care, essence, and other full range of products; shampoo and bath products; perfume, toilet water, talcum powder, and other products; and laundry liquid and other products. The company was founded in 2005 and is based in Quanzhou, China.
